sentences.text: I'm just come back from Pride weekend.

And so, because I'm in Denver we sponsor Jennifer Pride this year.
So we had a booth at the actual Civic Center Park, and then float in the parade.
And then we had games and giveaways, and it was just a fun time to represent Center space.
So my parents have like a little place up in Wells Main, which is like a little beach community.
I have 2 little ones I have a 7 year old and a 4 year old, so I took the 2 of them up there for the weekend
To the beach and hung out, and I'm done after today.
I took the rest of this week off so.
